sections.title: Hero
sections.note: Title, subtitle and CTA match. Live also has a Lottie video animation, not a static image — extraction omits any imageSrc which is acceptable.

sections.title: 3-column benefits
sections.note: Live has separate heading + paragraph per item; extraction concatenates with em-dash into label. Acceptable but not canonical (could use title+description).

sections.title: Des rapports qui facilitent la prise de décision
Plus qu'une solution de reporting flash
sections.note: Body 'En du flash report automatisé...' is awkward but reproduces live faithfully.

sections.title: Les bonnes pratiques de flash report
Les bonnes pratiques
sections.note: Live renders the 3 best practices as alternating feature-split sections with small SVG icons; collapsing them into a steps list is a reasonable design-system mapping.

sections.title: Ce qu'en disent nos clients
sections.note: Title 'Ce qu'en disent nos clients' is not on the live page (live only has the press section heading 'Ils parlent de nous' before the embedded testimonial cards) — minor heading addition for design-system needs. Marie-Odile Lhomme role is shortened from a longer live string, acceptable trim.

audit.summary: Extraction is faithful to the live page. All 17 sections map cleanly to live content (hero, intro, 3-col benefits, alternating feature-splits, two CTAs, best-practices, press quotes, testimonials). Minor notes: hero on live uses a Lottie animation rather than a static screenshot (no imageSrc in extract — fine); the icon-row labels merge live's per-tile heading + paragraph with an em-dash; the 3 best-practice tiles on live are alternating feature-splits collapsed into a steps section; testimonials section gets a fabricated heading 'Ce qu'en disent nos clients' which doesn't exist verbatim on live but is a reasonable design-system addition. No hallucinated sections, no truncations, all CTAs/hrefs and image URLs match live.
